metadata.description: VisionClaw Agent — agentic AI corporation in a box. 16 specialist personas, 243 tools, hybrid-search RAG, self-improving skills, multi-channel scheduling — all exposed as MCP.

plugins.name: visionclaw-agent
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to the VisionClaw Agent platform — delegate to specialist personas, run 243 production tools (Drive, email, calendar, web, code, scheduler, Stripe, marketing), and tap a self-evolving skill registry, all under per-tenant authentication.
